ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., BTC-USDT-SPOT) */,
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument type (e.g., SPOT, MARGIN, PERPETUAL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type (e.g., SPOT, MARGIN, PERPETUAL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "trade_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade type (e.g., LIMIT, MARKET) */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_types" (
  "trade_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade type */,
  "trade_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade type (e.g., LIMIT, MARKET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being ordered */,
  "order_type" INTEGER /* Type of the order (e.g., LIMIT, MARKET) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being executed */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade resulting from the execution */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price of the execution */,
  "execution_volume" REAL /* Volume of the execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_executions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_executions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_annotations_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being described */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., description, website) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_metadata_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being described */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., timestamp, price) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_metadata_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being described */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., timestamp, price) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_metadata_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being described */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., name, email) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metadata_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_graphics" (
  "graphic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graphic */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being described */,
  "graphic_type" TEXT /* Type of the graphic (e.g., chart, logo) */,
  "graphic_data" TEXT /* Data of the graphic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graphic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graphic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graphic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_graphics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_graphics" (
  "graphic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graphic */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being described */,
  "graphic_type" TEXT /* Type of the graphic (e.g., chart, logo) */,
  "graphic_data" TEXT /* Data of the graphic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graphic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graphic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graphic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_graphics_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being analyzed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., volume, price) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_instruments" (
  "user_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-instrument relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trades" (
  "user_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-trade relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orderbook" (
  "orderbook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orderbook entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price */,
  "bid_quantity" REAL /* Bid quantity */,
  "ask_quantity" REAL /* Ask quantity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the orderbook data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the orderbook data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the orderbook data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderbook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orderbook_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
